context.usage_scenario: Displays current score in real-time, updates every frame as score increases at 10 points/second, flashes white for 0.1 seconds at every 100-point milestone

visual_specification.shape: Text string of 5 digits with zero-padding (e.g., 00042, 01234, 99999)
visual_specification.texture: Monospace pixel font, crisp pixel rendering

animation.description: No sprite animation. Text updates every frame based on ScoreSystem.current_score. Flash effect: color changes to #FFFFFF for 0.1 seconds when score % 100 == 0

visual_specification.details: 5-digit number with leading zeros, monospace font (10px per character), right-aligned at top-right corner with 10px margin from edges

relationships.shared_with: Same font style and size (16px) as gameover_screen score display
relationships.differences_from: gameover_screen displays final score centered with additional text. score_display is live updating and top-right positioned

explicit_negations: No shadows or outlines on text
No gradients or color variations (except white flash)
No transparency except full alpha channel
